title: No Nether
description: Disable enter the Nether using the portal | No Nether | Remove Nether
body:
# No Nether - Datapack

## Description
The **No Nether** datapack disables access to the Nether dimension in Minecraft. This is ideal for players who want to focus on the Overworld and other dimensions without interference from the Nether.

## Features
- Prevents players from entering the Nether dimension.
- Lightweight and easy to install.

## Installation
1. Download the `no-nether.zip` file.
2. Place the file in the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world directory.
3. Start or `/reload` your Minecraft world. The datapack will automatically activate.
